comments.author: anon-ab6221f8
comments.content: Starting implementation of crosslink kickoff cleanup command (GH #298). Need to explore existing kickoff code, discovery logic, and plan the approach.

comments.author: anon-ab6221f8
comments.content: Plan: 1) Extract shared discover_agents() from list(). 2) Add Cleanup variant to KickoffCommands in main.rs. 3) Implement cleanup() fn in kickoff.rs that reuses discovery, classifies agents, and removes done/stale ones. 4) Wire up dispatch.
